programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back In Business
programme.desc: The buzz is back in Barbershop 2. Calvin is struggling to keep his father's shop alive, this time against urban developers looking to replace "mom & pop" establishments with name-brand chains. The world changes, but some things never go out of style...

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Brendan Gleeson is Murray, a once proud fisherman who now, along with his former colleagues in the harbour of Tickle Head are out of work and forced to live off welfare.

programme.title: The Hustle
programme.desc: Josephine Chesterfield (Anne Hathaway) is a glamorous, seductive Brit with a penchant for defrauding gullible wealthy men. Into her well-ordered world bursts Penny Rust (Rebel Wilson), an Aussie who is as free-form and fun-loving as Josephine is calculated and cunning.

programme.title: The Little Vampire
programme.desc: From the screenwriters of Chicken Run and The Addams Family, comes The Little Vampire: a fantastic adventure that you can really sink your teeth into!

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: Chipwrecked
programme.desc: The vacationing Chipmunks and Chipettes are turning a luxury cruise liner into their personal playground, until they become "chipwrecked" on a remote island.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E12 First Brat - The girls are assigned babysitting duty at the White House for the President's 11-year-old daughter, Madison. At first Madison seems to be a perfect angel, but, as soon as her dad is out of sight, she turns into a major brat.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E13 W.O.W - Ariel is the leader of W.O.W. – “Women of Wrestling”, a vicious wrestling troop made up of a race of ancient, deadly, tall, and strong warriors!

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land and Sea
programme.desc: With access to the UK's Maritime Coastguard Agency and Mountain Rescue Teams, follow the extraordinary men and women who put their own lives at risk to save members of the public 24/7.

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land and Sea
programme.desc: With access to the UK's Maritime Coastguard Agency and Mountain Rescue Teams, follow the extraordinary men and women who put their own lives at risk to save members of the public 24/7.

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land and Sea
programme.desc: With access to the UK's Maritime Coastguard Agency and Mountain Rescue Teams, follow the extraordinary men and women who put their own lives at risk to save members of the public 24/7.

programme.title: Disaster Zone: Volcano in New York
programme.desc: (2006) Fiery drama with Michael Ironside. Things heat up when an underground experiment blows the lid off Manhattan - literally. With lava in the streets, a construction crew must plug the meltdown.

programme.title: Jet Stream
programme.desc: A TV weatherman tries to find a way to stop devastating winds from ravaging the Earth. Starring David Chokachi, Ruth Kearney and Steven Hartley (2013).

programme.title: Firequake
programme.desc: (2014) Sci-fi action with Alexandra Paul, Zoe Barker and Nigel Barber. When a new, highly explosive energy source seeps into the Earth's crust, can its creator save humanity from being extinguished?

programme.title: Loving Vincent
programme.desc: Vincent Willem van Gogh is undoubtedly one of the most famous and influential figures in the history of Western art. Yet during his lifetime Vincent struggled with poverty and depression, dying at only 37 years old.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Bernie the Dolphin
programme.desc: A heart-warming, wholesome family adventure about a brother and sister who befriend badly sunburned dolphin Bernie, who has recently been separated from his family. When Bernie goes missing and the kids go looking for him, they discover a real-estate development plan that threatens the baby sea turtles on their favourite beach. Can the brave duo stop the developers while racing to reunite Bernie with his loved ones?

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows. When Paul, who can't stand his sister's spoiled pet, abandons Marnie at a rural petrol station she comes across a loyal band of drifters who join forces to capture a notorious, local gang of petty thieves. A pur-fectly hilarious tail of friendship, secret-missions and side-splitting cat-itude! A.k.a. Marnie's World

programme.title: Luna: Spirit of the Whale
programme.desc: When a single Orca is seen near Vancouver Island, it's clear it got separated from its pod and is in the wrong spot. Ted Jeffries and his team at the Department of Fisheries & Oceans (DFO) want to catch Luna and bring him back to his family. But, the local folks think it should be up to Luna to decide where to stay.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: Quirt Evans, an all round bad guy, is nursed back to health and sought after by Penelope Worth, a Quaker girl. He eventually finds himself having to choose between his world and the world Penelope lives in.

programme.title: Memoirs Of An Invisible Man
programme.desc: When a government experiment goes awry it renders an innocent bystander invisible.

programme.title: Killer Klowns From Outer Space
programme.desc: One-of-a-kind alien invasion sci-fi featuring blood drinking alien clowns harvesting a small city.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Uptown Girls: Uptown Girls (2003)
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: A father goes undercover and infiltrates a Mexican drug cartel for the DEA in order to free his son.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: A mommy vlogger seeks to uncover the truth behind her best friend Emily's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Flypaper
programme.desc: During a bank robbery, a man decides to protect the pretty teller who he has fallen head over heels for.

programme.title: But I'm a Cheerleader
programme.desc: Megan's parents decide to send her off to a strict summer camp that aims to turn gay youths straight.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: A mommy vlogger seeks to uncover the truth behind her best friend Emily's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: It's a Boy Girl Thing
programme.desc: It's A Boy Girl Thing is a brilliantly funny romantic comedy about next-door neighbours who live worlds apart. Woody Deane (Zegers) and Nell Bedworth (Armstrong) are life long sworn enemies who wake up one day to find themselves in a very strange place: each others bodies. In their switched identities, each sets out to destroy the other's high school reputation. When they start to succeed they get more than they bargained for. Sometimes falling in love can be an out of body experience.

programme.title: Bernie
programme.desc: In small-town Texas, an affable mortician strikes up a friendship with a wealthy widow, though when she starts to become controlling, he goes to great lengths to separate himself from her grasp.

programme.title: Music
programme.desc: Golden Globe award nominee Music is the directorial debut from multi-Grammy Award nominee and global superstar Sia. Starring Academy Award nominee Kate Hudson, Tony and Grammy Award winner Leslie Odom Jr. and Sia-protégé Maddie Ziegler and Juliette Lewis. While on a journey of discovery, a newly sober woman becomes the sole guardian of her half-sister, Music, a young girl on the autism spectrum.

programme.title: Mythica: The Necromancer
programme.desc: A non-stop action fantasy that will transport you into a world of sorcerers, trolls and witches. When her most loyal friend is taken hostage by the cruel master of the Thieves Guild, Marek embarks on a corrupt mission. But when the mission leads into the clutches of Szorlok - their greatest enemy - Marek must sacrifice her ambitions and perhaps her own soul to save her friends.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: Inspired by true historical events, this epic action thriller stars martial arts legend Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Adrian Brody. When corrupt Roman leader Tiberius arrives with a giant army to claim the Silk Road, Huo An (Chan), teams up his army with an mysterious elite Legion, led by General Lucius (Cusack), to protect his country. A tale of courage, friendship and honour.

programme.title: Class Rank
programme.desc: From the director of Glee, presenting a coming-of-age drama, in the vein of Easy A and Legally Blonde. Starring Olivia Holt (Cloak & Dagger), Skyler Gisondon (Booksmart), Bruce Dern (The Senator). Two high school outsiders join forces to overtake the local school board. Guided by their families, they enter the perilous world of politics and learn a thing or two about love.

programme.title: Edge of the World
programme.desc: The Revenant meets Last of the Mohicans, this is the epic, swashbuckling adventure story that inspired The Man Who Would Be King. Starring Jonathan Rhys Meyers (The Tudors) as Sir James Brook, the English adventurer who fought pirates and slavery to rule a kingdom in the jungles of Borneo in 1840. As he embarks on a lifelong crusade to end head-hunting, he is framed for murder and piracy charges.

programme.title: The Happiness Playbook
programme.desc: (2022) Romcom with Kabby Borders and Tyler Harlow. A journalist goes undercover to expose the truth about a mysterious retreat. But when sparks fly with its owner, will love be the front-page story?

programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Vanessa Sears. When mysterious love letters appear in her mailbox, a woman embarks on a heartfelt quest -finding love where she least expects it.

programme.title: Love on the Vines
programme.desc: (2017) A charming, full-bodied romantic comedy with Margo Harshman. When a lawyer is forced to spend six weeks on a vineyard in order to inherit it, unexpected romance becomes the sweetest vintage.

programme.title: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: Jamie Spellman struggles to balance her dream of painting with the reality of such a difficult career choice, while having to choose between two men who seem perfect, but for very different reasons.

programme.title: Rome in Love
programme.desc: Amelie high profile role, to play Audrey Hepburn's character in a remake of Roman Holiday has gained press attention. Can she keep her identity under wraps whilst in Rome? (2019)

programme.title: Made for You, with Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Despite the Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: 23 Walks
programme.desc: Dave and Fern, two older strangers, have been bruised by their individual circumstance. They meet walking their dogs in a North London park, and over the course of twenty-three walks together romance begins to blossom.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: In her Academy Award winning role, Cher, while waiting for her timid fiance to decide between her and his mother, falls in love with her fiance's estranged brother, a bakery worker with a love of opera and life.

programme.title: Guess Who
programme.desc: A sarcastic father (Bernie Mac) has plenty to say about his daughter wanting to marry a white boy (Ashton Kutcher).

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: All Aboard For Love
programme.desc: As Alison prepares for new ocean adventures, business executive Joel navigates his way into her heart and they become co-captains for life.

programme.title: Bookworm and the Beast
programme.desc: Izzy is ready to make a difference in the world as she starts her career in public relations. When Grant Beiste - the big-headed corporate celebrity in town - accidentally hits her father with a car, Izzy is thrown into a public scandal that forces her to work closely with Grant. As she fights to save both her father and Grant's public image, she falls in love and learns not to judge a book by it's cover.

programme.title: Tempting Fate
programme.desc: Gabby's marriage is jeopardized when she meets Matt.

programme.title: The College Admissions Scandal
programme.desc: Two wealthy mothers obsess over getting their teens into top colleges.

programme.title: Shattered Families
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime.

programme.title: Judicial Indiscretion
programme.desc: Monica Barrett learns she is on the President's shortlist.

programme.title: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: Alex, post her mom's murder, aims to normalize life for her siblings.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Widowed doctor Jessica vacations in Fiji with her daughter and finds love with resort owner Will.

programme.title: The Love Club: Lauren
programme.desc: Lauren faces divorce papers but has a feeling that it's not quite over, so she asks the Love Club for help.

programme.title: Abduction of Angie
programme.desc: Paramedic Miranda races to save her daughter Angie, who was kidnapped by Miranda's estranged father.

programme.title: Amber's Story
programme.desc: This is the true story of the kidnapping of Amber Hagerman and how her family came together to help other abducted children as a result of her tragedy which resulted in a new system to help find missing children - The Amber Alert.

programme.title: Bewitched (2005)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Nicole Kidman and wickedly funny Will Ferrell star as actors playing Darrin and Samantha on a remake of the television show "Bewitched" in this cleverly crafty comedy from director NoraEphron.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: Based on the beloved bestselling novel, A Dog's Way Home chronicles the heartwarming adventure of Bella (voiced by Bryce Dallas Howard), a devoted dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

programme.title: The Jane Austen Book Club
programme.desc: A terrific ensemble cast takes reading the classics to new heights of passion in this charming romantic comedy.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A widow's husband is reincarnated 25 years later as a dashing young man their daughter's age.

programme.title: Adiós Gringo
programme.desc: A gunslinger on the run for a murder he didn't commit goes to New Mexico where he hopes to find a person who can exculpate him. While on his way he finds a girl who has been kidnapped and tortured, sets her free and then takes his revenge at gunpoint.

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: In Tulsa, after a rancher dies during a feud with a major oil company, his daughter, driven by revenge, starts digging for oil herself.

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: In 1854, Jeb Stuart, George Custer and other graduates from West Point are posted to Kansas to help pacify the territory before railroad construction to Santa Fe can resume.

programme.title: Long Days of Vengeance
programme.desc: After three years of brutal labor for a crime he didn't commit, ex-Sheriff Ted Barnett escapes prison to hunt down the three men who framed him for his father's murder. "Long Days of Vengeance" is a gripping spaghetti western about justice, revenge, and redemption under the scorching desert sun.

programme.title: Nowhere To Go
programme.desc: In London, a Canadian serving prison time for grand theft escapes prison and attempts to retrieve his loot, kept in a bank safety deposit box, but his accomplice takes the security key while he only has the pass code.

programme.title: Pink String and Sealing Wax
programme.desc: In 1890's Brighton, the young son of a puritanical chemist longs to escape the repressive environment of his family life and the overbearing restraints of his cruel, pious father. Eventually finding refuge in a local tavern, he is immediately attracted to the sordid glamour of the drinking classes and the gritty world that they inhabit. He also finds himself becoming infatuated with the tavern's landlady, which will inadvertently lead to him being drawn into a plot to kill her abusive husband. Directed by Robert Hamer (Kind Hearts and Coronets, School For Scoundrels), Pink String and Sealing Wax stars Googie Withers (The Lady Vanishes), Mervyn Johns (Dead of Night) and Gordon Jackson (Whisky Galore! / The Quatermass Experiment) in a film that cleverly entwines the dynamics of a thriller with biting social commentary and a multi-layered plot structure that contrasts the parallels of the British class system.

programme.title: Simon and Laura
programme.desc: A TV studio hits upon an idea for a new programme - an hour-long show five days a week showing the trials and tribulations of the life of a married couple.

programme.title: Secret People
programme.desc: Two girls come from abroad to a small Paddington cafe in the London of 1930, run by Anselmo, an ebullient South European. They are sisters - Maria and Nora - aged 19 and 10. They have been entrusted to Anselmo by their father, an outspoken writer threatened by his own country's police. He has sacrificed himself to save his daughters, while Louis, the young man Maria loves, has stayed behind to continue the struggle.

programme.title: Portrait From Life
programme.desc: Major Lawrence is on leave in London. Idly wandering into an art gallery, he is struck by the beauty of a young girl in a painting. At his side is another surprised visitor who excitedly declares that the picture is of his daughter.

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall.

programme.title: Little Brother
programme.desc: A warming and touching drama about a 9-year-old troublemaker who suddenly starts behaving himself believing that being good can save his ill brother.

programme.title: B grade Twenties
programme.desc: "Hyun-soo." Shocked and devastated, Kyeore quickly begins preparing a new screenplay. Imperfect as it may be, it brings together a group of graduation film team members, capturing their growth and love story."Kyeo-re," a 4th-year student majoring in film directing at an art school, pours her heart and soul into her graduation film screenplay one morning, only to have it stolen by her former boyfriend and senior in the same major,

programme.title: Making Family
programme.desc: An independent career woman has a boy by artificial insemination, who grows up with one simple dream: to meet his biological father.

programme.title: Very Ordinary Couple
programme.desc: Former couple goes tit for tat after a bitter break up going into a deeper spiral of love and hate.

programme.title: Moonlit Winter
programme.desc: Sae-bom finds a mysterious love letter sent to her mom Yun-hee. This letter makes her wonder about Yun-hee.

programme.title: My Mother, The Mermaid
programme.desc: Na-young who arrives at her parents' hometown to find her father is shocked to meet her 20-year old mother.

programme.title: Karaoke Crazies
programme.desc: Sung-wook hires a helper Ha-Suck at his karaoke. Soon she starts to use a special tactic to lure customers in.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: Last Signal
programme.desc: When a meteor shower unexpectedly ravages her hometown, Lera's father finds ingenious ways to communicate with her from aboard the space station Mira.

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries
programme.desc: (2014) Cosy mystery drama with Eric Mabius. The detectives receive a letter from a deceased woman and help her two daughters piece together clues from the past.

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries
programme.desc: (2014) Cosy mystery drama with Eric Mabius. The postal detectives receive special approval to intervene when a man receives devastating news that could lead him to drastic actions.

programme.title: An Emma Fielding Mystery: Site Unseen
programme.desc: (2017) Murder mystery with Courtney Thorne-Smith. While at a 17th century archaeological site, Emma and her students find a very modern-day body - and help an FBI agent excavate the truth.

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: John Skillpa, a quiet bank clerk living in tiny Peacock, Nebraska, prefers to live an invisible life. This might have to do with John's secret: he has another personality no one knows about, a woman who each morning cooks him breakfast before he starts his day. Then, in a moment, everything changes.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of Barry Minkow, the youngest person ever to defraud Wall Street and who by the age of 21 was worth a staggering 100 million dollars.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: A Monster Calls
programme.desc: From the director of THE IMPOSSIBLE and the producers of PAN'S LABRYNTH, A MONSTER CALLS is a searing and fantastical story of one boy's journey to confront the truth.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: 1944, when the women from a Welsh village find their husbands are missing, they must work with a German platoon to survive.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: The Dresser
programme.desc: In this wickedly funny and moving story, Sir reflects on his accomplishments and seeks to reconcile his turbulent friendships with those in his employ before the final curtain.

programme.title: Iron Fury
programme.desc: In 1944, a young lieutenant leads a courageous group of Russian soldiers in a German POW camp, plotting a daring escape from captivity in a half-dest

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A group of competitors participates in a wild, illegal car race across America, where the drivers use every dirty trick in the book to win.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.
